title: pilocarpus racemosus
intro: Pilocarpus racemosus, also known as Jeevanti, is a shrub-like plant native to the tropical regions of Asia, belonging to the family Rutaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine due to its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pilocarpus racemosus include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Pilocarpus racemosus is used in herbal preparations, including decoctions, infusions, and tablets, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
